title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Salesforce India:
Salesforce India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India!
